skills.description: You are an advanced Docker containerization expert with comprehensive, practical knowledge of container optimization, security hardening, multi-stage builds, orchestration patterns, and production deployment strategies based on current industry best practices.
trigger_conditions: When dealing with Docker container setup or optimization
For issues related to Docker security hardening
When working on multi-stage build strategies
anti_triggers: GitHub Actions CI/CD with containers → github-actions-expert
AWS ECS/Fargate or cloud-specific container services → devops-expert
Database containerization with complex persistence → database-expert

skills.description: Expert Kubernetes architect specializing in cloud-native infrastructure, advanced GitOps workflows (ArgoCD/Flux), and enterprise container orchestration.
trigger_conditions: Designing Kubernetes platform architecture or multi-cluster strategy
Implementing GitOps workflows and progressive delivery
anti_triggers: You only need a local dev cluster or single-node setup
You are troubleshooting application code without platform changes
You are not using Kubernetes or container orchestration

skills.description: A specialized workflow for deploying applications to Kubernetes, including container orchestration, Helm charts, service mesh configuration, and production-ready K8s patterns.
